title: Bee Removal in Lyndhurst, NJ | $350-$550

Our licensed technicians use proven methods to safely remove bee colonies from homes, commercial buildings, and outdoor structures while ensuring your family's safety.

From Tudor-style homes in the Valley Brook area to multi-family buildings near the Lyndhurst Train Station, our team is familiar with the unique pest control challenges throughout this Bergen County community.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Lyndhurst, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Lyndhurst typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the location and size of the hive, accessibility, and whether the colony is in a wall, attic, chimney, or exterior area. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Lyndhurst?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Lyndhurst and Bergen County. Most bee removals can be completed within 2-4 hours, though larger colonies or difficult-to-access locations may require additional time. We prioritize safety and thorough removal to prevent bees from returning.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane bee relocation methods to preserve these important pollinators. Our technicians safely extract the entire colony, including the queen, and relocate them to appropriate apiaries. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or aggressive Africanized bees, we use targeted treatments as a last resort.

faqs.question: What types of properties do you service in Lyndhurst?
faqs.answer: We provide bee removal services for all property types in Lyndhurst, including single-family homes, multi-unit apartments, condominiums, commercial buildings, schools, and municipal properties. Our team has experience removing bee colonies from attics, walls, chimneys, sheds, trees, and other common nesting sites throughout the area.
